explainers.weaker_tugrik: Higher values of these features tend to line up with a higher USD/MNT, which means a weaker tugrik.
explainers.stronger_tugrik: Higher values of these features tend to line up with a lower USD/MNT, which means a stronger tugrik.

comparison.takeaway: CNY/MNT also shows signal in this study, especially beyond the shortest horizon, which suggests the story is broader than the U.S. dollar alone.
